description: Multi-turn: list drafts -> reject one (covers `neomind device drafts reject`; previously only drafts list was covered).

turns.user: Which devices are currently in draft state?

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind device drafts list` (or device list with status=draft)
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind device drafts reject draft-001` (or equivalent API)
expectations.overall: Turn 2 must actually perform the reject action
